finding_results.notes: Preserved all required transfer facts (amounts, timings, IDs, pending/cleared state) while breaking ledger-template repetition with pressure-bearing counterbeats and varied sentence architecture across the call, text, and notebook sequences. Theo exchange no longer stacks adjacent metadata-only lines; emotional leverage is reintroduced without reducing economic specificity.
finding_results.summary: Transfer-log repetition was reshaped into higher-pressure prose that keeps financial precision but restores rhythmic and relational movement.
